sections.paragraph:
verb לסתור

to contradict, refute; destroy; neutralize; dishevel, disarrange

verb להיסתר

be contradicted, refuted; be hidden, concealed; be destroyed; neutralized

verb להסתתר

to hide, conceal oneself

verb להסתיר

to hide, conceal

verb הוסתר

be hidden, concealed

masculine noun

secret, secrecy, stealth; hiding place
